body.title: Librarian edge maintenance: typed edge_type + move Hebbian from Igor
body.result: edge_maintenance.py: Hebbian + backfill + query_by_type + EdgeMaintenanceWorker. Igor dreaming stub delegates to Librarian. 18 tests green.
body.description:
Move Hebbian strengthening and theme extraction from Igor's dreaming pass to Librarian background service — Librarian runs periodic consolidation on its own schedule, independent of Igor. Igor's dreaming pass becomes a stub.

Also add typed edge_type to every edge creation and strengthening call. Controlled vocabulary: 'implements', 'contradicts', 'derived_from', 'co-activates' (default for Hebbian). Existing edges without edge_type get default 'co-activates' on next strengthening pass (lazy migration).

Gate updated: T-memory-write-path (supersedes T-memory-agent-write-api).

**Affected files:** devices/librarian/ (new consolidation background task), devices/igor/cognition/dreaming.py (remove Hebbian + consolidation)
**Design rules:** igor-uses-not-contains, compiled-inference; controlled vocabulary only for edge_type; constraint violation logs and uses default, never raises
**Scope boundary:** IN — move Hebbian + consolidation to Librarian; add typed edge_type to all edge writes; OUT — retrieval logic (T-librarian-retrieval-service)
**Test plan:** Stop Igor; wait one consolidation cycle; verify interpretive_edges weights updated; new edges have edge_type set; existing edge gets 'co-activates' on next strengthening; query edges by type returns correct subset
